title: andrachne telephioides var. rotundifolia
intro: Andrachne telephioides var. rotundifolia is a variant of the Andrachne telephioides plant, also known as a type of spurge plant that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Andrachne telephioides var. rotundifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against various infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using the plant in a decoction, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
